name: nba-data-worker-legacy
description: Legacy worker — DO NOT DEPLOY. Production worker is workers/nba-data-worker.

scripts.deploy: node -e "if (!process.env.ALLOW_LEGACY_DEPLOY) { console.error('\nDO NOT DEPLOY: This is the legacy worker. Set ALLOW_LEGACY_DEPLOY=1 to deploy.\n'); process.exit(1); }" && wrangler deploy
